attributes.action: Make the present Oath of Allegiance optional.
attributes.additional_details: Currently, the political system is biased against Republicans. In a modern democratic society, swearing allegiance to a monarchy should not be compulsory.
attributes.background:
An elected politician who does not take the oath cannot sit, speak, vote, or draw a salary.
We want the compulsory oath to be replaced with a choice; we want the alternative to be an oath of allegiance to their constituents rather than to the Crown.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Allow people to take an oath of allegiance to the UK instead of the Crown
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764688
